name: Orange Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the sweet potatoes until tender.
2. Remove the skins.
3. Mash the pulp with a potato masher or electric mixer.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and whisk until fluffy.
5. Pour into a 1-quart ungreased casserole.
6. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for approximately 30 minutes.
